name: Androsphinx
damage_immunities: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) slashing damage.

actions.name: Sacred Flame
actions.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a dexterity saving throw or take 1d8 radiant damage. The target gains no benefit from cover for this saving throw.

actions.name: Command
actions.description: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. The spell has no effect if the target is undead, if it doesn't understand your language, or if your command is directly harmful to it.

actions.name: Lesser Restoration
actions.description: You touch a creature and can end either one disease or one condition afflicting it. The condition can be blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

actions.name: Dispel Magic
actions.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For each spell of 4th level or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a successful check, the spell ends.

actions.name: Banishment
actions.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another plane of existence. The target must succeed on a charisma saving throw or be banished.

actions.name: Flame Strike
actions.description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 4d6 fire damage and 4d6 radiant damage on a failed save, or half as m

actions.name: Greater Restoration
actions.description: You imbue a creature you touch with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect. You can reduce the target's exhaustion level by one, or end one of the following effects on the target:

legendary_actions.name: Claw Attack
legendary_actions.description: The sphinx makes one claw attack.

special_abilities.name: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The sphinx makes two claw attacks.

special_abilities.name: Inscrutable
special_abilities.description: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

special_abilities.name: Magic Weapons
special_abilities.description: The sphinx's weapon attacks are magical.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.description:
The sphinx is a 12th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 18, +10 to hit with spell attacks). It requires no material components to cast its spells. The sphinx has the following cleric spells prepared:

- Cantrips (at will): sacred flame, spare the dying, thaumaturgy
- 1st level (4 slots): command, detect evil and good, detect magic
- 2nd level (3 slots): lesser restoration, zone of truth
- 3rd level (3 slots): dispel magic, tongues
- 4th level (3 slots): banishment, freedom of movement
- 5th level (2 slots): flame strike, greater restoration
- 6th level (1 slot): heroes' feast
